title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping playbook for reaching $1M ARR in 117 days and scaling to $10M without external funding. The episode covers strategies on reducing churn, product-led growth, SEO and AEO tactics, outbound sales, pricing experiments, and decision-making frameworks for when to raise capital.
